roles.organization: Members of Commissions for State Doctoral Examinations
Members of Commissions for State Final Examinations at FIT
NES@FIT - Networks and distributed systems research group
Supervisors in Doctoral Study Programme at FIT

education_and_academic_qualification: 2017 - present: assistant professor at UIFS
2009 - 2016: doctoral studies at FIT BUT in Brno
2009 - 2012: interrupted bachelor's studies at the Faculty of Arts of MUNI in Brno (UCO 143220)
2007 - 2009: master's studies at FIT BUT in Brno
2004 - 2007: bachelor studies at FIT BUT in Brno
1996 - 2004: studying at the university embryo at the Gymnasium in Sumperk
2015 - co-founder of netsearch s.r.o.
2012 - present: instructor of Cisco instructors for ITC i-com-unity
2011 - present : freelance trainer for PCdir, ICTpro, Everesta
2007 - 2009: within the CCIE Incubator program as a network consultant at ANECT a.s.
2006 - 2007: administrator at AMAR s.r.o., MKR Plus, DATASERVIS
ANSA - modelling and simulation in OMNeT++
RINASim - modelling and simulation of Recursive InterNetwork Architecture
Cryptocurrencies (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Ripple, IOTA) and blockchain forensics
Provider networks (CISCO, Juniper) and their technologies (CDN, LISP, IS-IS)
computer virtualization (VMWare WS and ESXi) and networking (GNS3, UnetLab, EVE-ng)
PLOCHA civic association
LinkedIn profile
KPSZ
low-cost travel
Theory and history of film and audiovisual culture
coffee, absinthe, pipes, Doomtrooper, Marie
modelling naive erotic sculptures from expired plasticine
awards: The Commemorative Medal of FIT BUT (The Bronze Medal) 2025

teaching.consulting_hours: Friday, 9:00-:0 , B/C310 (Bozetechova 1/2, Brno 61200) !!! COVID-19 consultations !!! Anytime between 9am and 12am through MS Teams or Google Hangouts using university login after successful arrangement via email.
